fast.description: Shipped: regex + whitelist + blacklist (no ML, ~10 ms)

presidio.description: Shipped: Presidio (spaCy large) + regex + whitelist + blacklist

transformer.description: Shipped: regex + whitelist + blacklist + HF openai-privacy-filter

transformer_presidio.description: Shipped: regex + whitelist + blacklist + HF + Presidio

llm.description: Shipped: regex + whitelist + blacklist + LLM (gpt-4o-mini). Requires OPENAI_API_KEY.

llm_presidio.description: Shipped: regex + whitelist + blacklist + Presidio (spaCy small) + LLM. CPU-only. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY.

ensemble.description: Shipped: regex + whitelist + blacklist + Presidio + HF + LLM, longest-non-overlapping resolve. Highest recall, slow + expensive.
